steps.title: Use the whereas contrast
steps.content: The word whereas sets up an opposite relationship. Intensified information flow is linked to more decisive choices, so the blank should describe the opposite condition that leads to slower choices.

steps.title: Reject non-decrease verbs
steps.content: B, C, and D describe judging, identifying, or obtaining information flow; none expresses the opposite of intensified. The contrast requires a decrease in information flow. The answer is A.
